title: No function matches 'bitstring(BIT, INTEGER_LITERAL)'
description:
### What happens?

The [bitstring function](https://duckdb.org/docs/sql/functions/bitstring.html#bitstringbitstring-length) doesn't work. The given example results in this error:

```
Binder Error: No function matches the given name and argument types 'bitstring(BIT, INTEGER_LITERAL)'. You might need to add explicit type casts.
	Candidate functions:
	bitstring(VARCHAR, INTEGER) -> BIT

LINE 1: SELECT bitstring('1010'::BITSTRING, 7);
```

### To Reproduce

```sql
SELECT bitstring('1010'::BITSTRING, 7);
```

### OS:

Linux

### DuckDB Version:

1.0.0

### DuckDB Client:

CLI

### Hardware:

_No response_

### Full Name:

Liam Diprose

### Affiliation:

Liam Diprose

### What is the latest build you tested with? If possible, we recommend testing with the latest nightly build.

Yes

- [X] Yes, I have

- [X] Yes, I have
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, bit_col BIT(4), int_col INTEGER);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, bit_col, int_col) VALUES (DEFAULT, '1010', 7);
SELECT bit_col::VARCHAR AS bitstring, int_col FROM test_table WHERE id = 1;
key_bug_features: bitstring function fails with BIT and INTEGER arguments
